title: Violation Letter Input (renderViolationLetterBundlePdf ctx)
description: Documents the ACTUAL ctx shape consumed by lib/enforcement/violation_letter.js renderViolationLetterBundlePdf. Field names verified by reading the renderer source 2026-05-21. Letters are legally consequential — every fact in the rendered PDF must come from a field validated against this schema. Statutory wording is NOT in this schema; it injects at render time from lib/enforcement/violation_letter_rules.js so we have ONE source of truth for Texas §209 language.

stage.description: Escalation stage. Determines title, tone, cure period, mailing class (first-class vs. certified), and whether hearing-rights block + SCRA disclosure render.

letter_date.description: ISO date OR Date object representing the mailing date. Cure-by and hearing-by deadlines compute from this. Stamped at Mail Queue lock time. Renderer defaults to now() if absent.

street_address.description: PHYSICAL LOT address — never mailing. See CLAUDE.md SSOT table.

full_name.description: Legal name of record — renderer uses for salutation + envelope addressing.

mailing_address.description: Where the letter is mailed. NOT the property street address. For rentals, this is the off-site owner address.

legal_name.description: Full registered entity name, e.g., 'Waterview Estates Homeowners Association, Inc.'

violations.description: One or more violation findings being bundled in this letter. Empty array is rejected.

category_label.description: Short category — 'Lawn maintenance', 'Trash bins visible', 'Unapproved paint color', etc.

ai_description.description: Specific finding — what was observed, where, on what date. Not editorial language.

observation_captured_at.description: Date inspector documented the violation — ISO string or Date.

governing_doc.description: CC&R / Rules / Guidelines citation as extracted by the AI lens.

quote.description: Direct quote from the governing doc — woven into the letter inline.

prior_notices.description: Prior notices for THIS violation. Required for courtesy_2 + certified_209 + fine_assessed to satisfy §209 framework.

date.description: When the prior notice was sent.

close_up_photo_buffer.description: Buffer of the close-up photograph documenting this specific finding. Passes through to PDFKit doc.image() at render time.

fine_amount.description: DOLLARS (not cents) — renderer line 569 displays as $X.XX. ONLY populated for stage='fine_assessed'.

wrong_house_verified.description: 5-signal wrong-house verification result. MUST be true (or omitted) before any letter ships. See project_drv_module memory note.

wide_photo_buffer.description: Buffer of wide-shot property photo establishing identity for the entire letter (wrong-house insurance). Passes through to PDFKit.

community_logo_buffer.description: Buffer of community logo for the co-branded header. Renderer falls back to text-only HOA name + Bedrock cornerstone if absent.

certified_tracking_number.description: USPS certified mail tracking number. Stamped at mail-queue lock time on certified stages.

allOf.description: fine_assessed stage requires at least one violation with fine_amount > 0 (dollars)
Escalated stages (courtesy_2, certified_209, fine_assessed) require documented prior notices on every violation
